title: Penalties; license requirement
doc_html:
§183.  Penalties; license requirement

Whoever violates R.S. 45:181 or 45:182 shall be fined not less than one hundred dollars nor more than five hundred dollars for each offense, or imprisoned for not less than thirty days nor more than ninety days, or both.
doc_text:
§183.  Penalties; license requirement
Whoever violates R.S. 45:181 or 45:182 shall be fined not less than one hundred dollars nor more than five hundred dollars for each offense, or imprisoned for not less than thirty days nor more than ninety days, or both.
